title: Feelings Charades
description: A feelings game where kids listen to acted body clues, pick the matching face, and connect feelings to situations.
learningGoals: Name emotions from spoken body and voice clues
Practice acting feelings in a playful, safe way
interactionModel: choose-one tap the feeling face or situation card after an acted spoken prompt
feedbackModel: Correct answers sparkle and speak praise; misses wiggle with a gentle spoken replay cue.
credits: Shared character portraits and emoji placeholder answer art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
